jd_text: About Us We are a premium dry fruits brand with a strong and established presence across India and international markets. For over 10 years, we have been successfully exporting to the UAE and international markets. We are now entering a high-growth phase — launching and scaling our retail and digital presence across UAE and the wider GCC region, starting with Dubai. The Opportunity This is not a conventional role. We are looking for someone who can build, scale, and own our UAE business from a revenue standpoint — across marketplaces, digital platforms, and retail expansion. You will operate with high ownership, direct impact, and leadership visibility. Key Responsibilities * Own and scale revenue across Amazon UAE & Noon * Lead full-funnel performance marketing (Meta, Google, TikTok Ads) * Build and executeInstagram & TikTok growth strategies (paid + organic) * Drive brand visibility, customer acquisition, and repeat sales * Develop and execute UAE-specific go-to-market strategies * Coordinate with modern trade / retail channels for expansion * Take full ownership of monthly revenue targets, budgets, and ROI Who We’re Looking For * Proven track record in UAE / GCC e-commerce & digital growth (MANDATORY) * Experience managing significant ad budgets and scaling revenue * Strong expertise in Amazon, Noon, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads ecosystems * Deep understanding of UAE consumer behavior & market dynamics * Highly target-driven with P&L ownership mindset * Ability to operate as a growth leader, not just a manager * Candidates outside UAE must be ready to relocate to Dubai Compensation * AED 20,000 per month (negotiable for exceptional candidates) * Strong performance-linked incentives * Opportunity to grow into a regional leadership role (GCC expansion) Why This Role is Unique * Direct ownership of UAE market expansion * Work with a scaling international brand * High autonomy + fast decision-making environment * Clear path to lead GCC operations As part of your application, please include the following in your resume or cover note: Highest monthly revenue handled (AED) Platforms managed (Amazon, Noon, Meta, TikTok) Example of a brand/product you have scaled in UAE with results
